content_body: This is the first time in over 10 years of traveling with 3 other couples that we took a chance on just renting a house for the weekend. After our experience at Celtic Clouds once before, this will now be the norm for us! The view from the cabin was the biggest selling point for all of us, so beautiful! We especially loved the outdoor fireplace and enjoyed laughing, talking and staying up late each night. Overall, the beauty of the cabin itself, the privacy and the view made it a perfect weekend retreat. We would definitely stay here again.
title: A Perfect Weekend Retreat
